markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 4
#### Article 17
##### § 499-C — Calculation of supplemental registration fee

The supplemental registration fee to be charged pursuant to § 499-B (Collection of supplemental fee) , shall be calculated at a rate of twenty-five dollars per annum for each year or portion of a year that such registration is valid.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
